preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v Portland Timbers: Neville still eyeing improvements despite best season start
preReview.description: Portland Timbers are flying high in MLS, but Phil Neville still wants more as they prepare to travel to San Jose Earthquakes on Saturday.
